sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38970" key="e)pi/bradus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίβρᾰδ-υς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εια</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, υ</foreign>, <sense id="n38970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slow, hesitating</tr_>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μελλονικιᾶν</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
